scores.correctness_notes: The agent provides technically sound charm library implementation patterns (ops.Object, leadership gate, app databag writes, custom events) but misses the specific charmlibs approach: adding a provides endpoint to charmcraft.yaml, finding existing interface libraries in the listing, and installing them as PyPI packages or via charmcraft fetch-lib. The gold standard emphasises using existing charmlibs interface libraries rather than writing your own from scratch.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor code-level bugs rather than hallucinated APIs: in __init__, `framework.observe(...)` references `framework` which is not defined as a local variable (should be `charm.framework.observe(...)`); in the restore method, `self._relation_name` does not exist on `MyInterfaceReadyEvent`. All referenced ops classes (ops.Object, ops.EventBase, ops.ObjectEvents, ops.EventSource, ops.RelationChangedEvent) are real.
